commitResults.messageBody:
* Update add param table

* Update UG/DG on security layer

commitResults.messageTitle: Change leftpanel and rightpanel to scale horizontally
Straightforward Changes to UG and DG (#223)
commitResults.messageBody:
* Add unlock/lock clearing history, and edit edge case (same data)

* Standardise jar to Spyglass.jar in DG

* Update <showSetup> to CommandResult(showSetup=True)

* Update stereotypes for LogicClassDiagram

* Update stereotypes again for LogicModel

* Remove confirm in manual testing

* Remove Public John comment in adding contacts

* Standardise Unknwon command in UG and DG

* Change PersonStatus.PUBLIC

* Improve setup instructions on what happens if its closed

* Add destructors for CommandParsers, remove UndoRedo diagrams

* Standardise feedback passed in CommandResult in sequence diagrams

* Change flag from important to info for clearing of command history

* Streamline implementation details for lock/unlock

* Add enum attribute for PersonStatus.PUBLIC

* Add that result history is cleared on unlock/lock

* Standardise Spyglass, add caution in setup, add image for title change between modes

* Clean up glossary in User Guide

* Add prefix back to UG

commitResults.messageTitle: Enhance find to search on all attributes (including phone num, email, address and tags) (#224)
commitResults.messageBody:
* Update find to search through all fields

* Update tests, and email matches entirely, local-part or domain name

* Update UG for find, and testing for find command

commitResults.messageTitle: Add cosmetic details to UG, made unlock/lock clearer (#226)

commitResults.messageBody:
- bound CommandHistory to the most recent 100 commands
- bound ResultHistory to the most recent 200 feedback entries
- update history tests to verify eviction/retention behavior
- document command/result history retention limits in UG and DG

* Fix PED Bugs

- clarify tag and email validation messages
- split parser and execution flows in the sequence diagrams
- update Developer Guide notes for shared parsing behavior
- refine result history readability with CSS tweaks

* Fix checkstyle

* Correct the diagrams

* Fix checkstyle

commitResults.messageTitle: Improve text overflow handling and clarify tag (#232)
commitResults.messageBody:
* Improve text overflow handling and clarify tag
display limits

- update person detail and list card layouts/styles to better handle long text with ellipsis behavior
- adjust UI styling for readability in result/history related components
- document that very long tags may overflow UI and may not be fully displayed
- align User Guide and Developer Guide wording with current UI behavior

* Remove a NFR

commitResults.messageTitle: Update duplicate detection to use name and phone (#227)
commitResults.messageBody:
* Update duplicate detection to use name and phone

* Refactor duplicate comparison into Name
Scale UI to keep ratio between left and right panel consistent
